title: Thirty-two new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta June 4–6
summary: On June 4, YKHC reports thirty-one new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. New COVID-19 Cases The 31 are residents in: Aniak (1) Atmautluak (5) Bethel (6) Kwethluk (2) Marshall (2) Mountain Village (6) St. Mary’s (1) Tununak (8) — On June 5, YKHC reports one new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. title: Producers have until June 30 to sign up to receive the 2022 Census of Agriculture
summary: Agriculture producers who did not receive the 2017 Census of Agriculture and do not receive other USDA surveys or censuses have until June 30 to sign up to receive the 2022 Census of Agriculture at nass.usda.gov/AgCensus.
